explanations.pt-br: Define as 5 componentes do template golden: system, context, instruction, examples e output_format.
explanations.en-us: Defines the 5 components of the golden template: system, context, instruction, examples, and output_format.

explanations.pt-br: Monta o prompt final usando f-string com todas as componentes interpoladas.

explanations.pt-br: Imprime o prompt formatado no console.
explanations.en-us: Prints the formatted prompt to the console.
